# Phase-04 — Storage Systems & Table Formats

> Understand file formats and open table formats that define the lakehouse.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 15-17**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [File Formats: Parquet, ORC, Avro](01_File_Formats_Parquet_ORC_Avro.prompt.md) | `File_Formats.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 02 | [Columnar Storage Internals](02_Columnar_Storage_Internals.prompt.md) | `Columnar_Storage_Internals.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 03 | [Object Storage and Data Lakes](03_Object_Storage_and_Data_Lakes.prompt.md) | `Object_Storage_and_Data_Lakes.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 04 | [Delta Lake](04_Delta_Lake.prompt.md) | `Delta_Lake.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 05 | [Apache Iceberg](05_Apache_Iceberg.prompt.md) | `Apache_Iceberg.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 06 | [Apache Hudi](06_Apache_Hudi.prompt.md) | `Apache_Hudi.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 07 | [Table Format Comparison and Selection](07_Table_Format_Comparison_and_Selection.prompt.md) | `Table_Format_Comparison.md` | 45 min + 2h |
| 08 | [Compression and Encoding Strategies](08_Compression_and_Encoding_Strategies.prompt.md) | `Compression_and_Encoding.md` | 45 min + 2h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
